title: Users
manageUsers: Manage user accounts and their permissions
searchUsers: Search users by username or email...
noUsersSearch: No users match your search criteria. Try adjusting your search terms.
noUsersEmpty: Get started by creating your first user to manage access.
globalUsersInfo: Global users can access all buckets. Tenant users are limited to their tenant's buckets.
tenantAdminsInfo: Tenant admins can only create users within their own tenant.
selectRole: Select the role for this user.
adminRole: Admin - Full access to manage the system
userRole: User - Standard user with normal access
readonlyRole: Read Only - Can only view, cannot modify
unlockMessage: Are you sure you want to unlock "{{username}}"?
manageAccessKeys: Manage S3 API access keys for all users
deleteAccessKeyMessage: Are you sure you want to delete access key "{{keyId}}" for user "{{username}}"?
ssoAuthDesc: This user will authenticate via SSO. Use their email as username.
localAuthDesc: This user will authenticate with a local password.
allAccessKeysDesc: All S3 API access keys across users
searchByKeyOrUser: Search by access key ID or username...
accessKeysWillAppear: Access keys will appear here when users create them.
twoFactorSubtitle: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a verification code from an authenticator app
recommendEnable2FA: Enable 2FA to protect your account from unauthorized access.
only2FAGlobalAdmins: This user has 2FA enabled. Only global administrators can disable it.
lastAdminInTenant: Every tenant must have at least one admin. This is the last admin in the tenant.
aboutToDeleteKey: You are about to delete the access key
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
twoFADisabledDesc: Two-factor authentication has been disabled for this user.
regenerateCodesConfirm: This will invalidate all existing backup codes and generate new ones. Continue?
codesRegeneratedDesc: Your new backup codes are ready. Please save them in a secure location.
userNotFoundDesc: The requested user does not exist.
adminResetPasswordInfo: As an admin, you can reset this user's password without knowing their current password.
createKeyDesc: Create an access key to allow programmatic access to this user's resources.
onlyAdminsChangeRoles: Only administrators can change user roles.
cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
accessKeyInfoMsg: An access key and secret key pair will be automatically generated for this user.
secretKeyOnceMsg: The secret key will only be displayed once after creation. Make sure to copy and store it in a safe place.
secretKeyWarning: This is the only time the secret key will be displayed. Copy and store it in a safe place before closing this window.
disable2FAConfirmSelf: Are you sure you want to disable 2FA? This will make your account less secure.
disable2FAConfirmOther: Are you sure you want to disable 2FA for this user? This will make their account less secure.
notInAnyGroup: This user is not a member of any group.
notInAnyGroupSelf: You are not a member of any group.
alreadyInAllGroups: This user is already in all available groups.
